title: handle_send: returned message_id is a random UUID unrelated to relay or JMAP store
description: api.rs handle_send generates a fresh Uuid::new_v4() as message_id in SendResponse. This UUID has no relationship to any relay-assigned or DB-assigned identifier. A caller who uses the returned message_id to track delivery receipts or correlate with Message/get will never find a match. The ID is disconnected from the system. Fix: document explicitly that the ID is client-side correlation only, not a JMAP Message id, or (better) store the outgoing message in the JMAP store and return its id.
